name: @soul/core
description: Soul 分身框架核心 SDK，与运行环境无关（Node.js / Electron / CLI）

scripts.test: node --test dist/tests/core.test.js dist/tests/skill-reranker.test.js dist/tests/tool-permission-policy.test.js dist/tests/tool-router.export-excel.test.js dist/tests/document-ir.test.js dist/tests/tool-router.generate-document.test.js dist/tests/life-store.test.js dist/tests/life-forgetter.test.js dist/tests/life-generator.test.js dist/tests/life-density.test.js dist/tests/life-grower.test.js dist/tests/soul-loader.test.js dist/tests/structured-memory.test.js dist/tests/avatar-quality-scores.test.js
scripts.test:all: node --test dist/tests/core.test.js dist/tests/ocr-html-cleaner.test.js dist/tests/skill-reranker.test.js dist/tests/tool-permission-policy.test.js dist/tests/tool-router.export-excel.test.js dist/tests/document-ir.test.js dist/tests/tool-router.generate-document.test.js dist/tests/life-store.test.js dist/tests/life-forgetter.test.js dist/tests/life-generator.test.js dist/tests/life-density.test.js dist/tests/life-grower.test.js dist/tests/soul-loader.test.js dist/tests/structured-memory.test.js dist/tests/avatar-quality-scores.test.js
scripts.quality: echo '=== TypeScript 类型检查 ===' && npm run typecheck && echo '=== ESLint 代码质量检查 ===' && npm run lint && echo '=== 全部检查通过 ==='

author: zhi.qu
